sampling.note: uids sorted before rng.choice for reproducibility

session_pick: v2: min(10, n_days) days chosen evenly spaced across the user's sorted day list; 10 session slots allocated round-robin across chosen days (evenly spaced within day); 2 spares evenly spaced over the remainder. Guarantees sessions span >= 3 distinct days; asserted by post-check before output.
v1_deviation_note: v1 assigned spares as the two chronologically last picks, allowing sessions to collapse onto <3 days for 15/280 users; v1 outputs discarded, never used for downloads or analysis.
